授業目的: This course will guide students to pursue their own programs of study.  Students will be expected to write reports which they will present in class in order to reach an improved understanding of the themes they have selected for their graduation theses.
到達目標: Students will critically think and question general beliefs about language and determine whether they are scientifically valid or not.
授業方法: group discussionindividual presentationEnglish-medium instruction---------------------------------------When necessary, remote class meetings will be given through a video conferencing application, such as Zoom.

トピック.授業外学習2: Students are required to be fully prepared for each class, based on their written drafts, so that they can improve their ideas and presentation skills through in-class discussions and their own presentations.

学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
